---
title: "Day 1 — Foundation Setting"
subtitle: "Monday 15 June 2026"
---

*Establishing common vocabulary and introducing the case studies.*

## Schedule

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | Arrival and registration |
| 10:00–10:30 | Welcome and opening by the Lorentz Center |
| 10:30–12:00 | Icebreakers · **Introduction to Survival Analysis** (lecture + Q&A) |
| 12:00–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | **Introduction to Infectious Disease Modeling** (lecture + Q&A) · Form mixed groups · Introduce case study |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | **Plenary:** Groups present first ideas on how to approach their case study |
| 17:00–19:00 | Welcome reception |

---

## Materials

### Introduction to Survival Analysis

*Slides will be posted here*

### Introduction to Infectious Disease Modeling

*Slides will be posted here*

### Case Study Overview

*Background document will be posted here — see also the [Case Study](case-studies.qmd) page*
